sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Look at history to understand visited states
print(f"History length: {len(history)}")
for i, h in enumerate(history):
    seg = h.frame.segmentation
    blues = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'S']
    positions = []
    for b in blues:
        rows = [p[0] for p in b['boundary']]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b['boundary']]
        positions.append(f"({min(rows)},{min(cols)})")
    print(f"  Step {i}: action={h.action}, blues at {positions}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try UP to reach new state (49, 24, 49, 34)
result = action(['UP'])
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'S':
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  Blue: bbox=({min(rows)},{min(cols)})-({max(rows)},{max(cols)})")
for a, b in seg['adjacency_list']:
    na = seg['nodes'][a]
    nb = seg['nodes'][b]
    if na['color'] == 'S' or nb['color'] == 'S':
        print(f"  Adj: {na['color']}({a}) - {nb['color']}({b})")
print("gameplay_changed:", last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed'))
print("level_completed:", last_action_result.get('level_completed'))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
